'''Fassa''' was a gaunt male [[Rutian/Legends|Rutian]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who served as dock manager for [[Vogga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] docks on the Hutt homeworld [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta's]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]], [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. When the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] exile [[Meetra Surik]] came to Nar Shaddaa searching for the missing [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Zez-Kai Ell]], Fassa asked her to help assign three freighters their ID signatures, and later aided her by transporting the refugee [[Kahranna]]'s family to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Telos IV|Telos]] and possibly hiring the veteran [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Odis]].

==Behind the scenes==
Fassa was originally planned to be a [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]], there are cut audio files in the game with all of Fassa's lines spoken with a Toydarian voice. It is unknown why the developers chose to replace the original Fassa with a Twi'lek and his voice-over with generic Twi'lek sounds. Fassa appears as a [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] in the Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords restored content mod.

Originally, Fassa was voiced by [[Andrew Secombe]], who was the voice of [[Watto/Legends|Watto]] in [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] and has played other [[Toydarian]]s.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
